content: Polyglot monorepo: apps/<name> for deployables (apps/voice Python + uv, apps/auth Next.js), cli/ or tools/ for operator binaries (cli/kv Go with its own go.mod), infra/terraform for terragrunt live tree + versioned modules (proven defcon.run.34 layout). Each language keeps native tooling at its subtree root (pyproject.toml, package.json, go.mod) — no cross-language build orchestrator needed at this scale; per-app Dockerfiles; GitHub Actions path filters per app for CI. Shared contracts (OIDC claims shape, DynamoDB table names/schemas) documented in a top-level docs/ or generated into each app.
